titles: 코스피 6000 돌파했는데, 이 숫자 모르면 전부 잃을 수 있어 — 유가 170달러 시나리오
전쟁 중인데 증시 역대급? 코스피 6000 뒤에 숨은 시한폭탄
유가 170달러 vs 코스피 7500 — 지금 안 보면 후회할 두 갈래 길

image_concepts.A: 트럼프 + 이란 협상 결렬 — 트럼프가 팔짱 끼고 냉소적 표정으로 불타는 유조선과 치솟는 유가 차트를 배경에 두고 서 있는 장면
image_concepts.B: 한국 투자자 환호 vs 경고 — 코스피 6091 전광판 앞에서 한국인 투자자가 두 손 들고 환호하지만, 전광판 한쪽에 유가 $170 빨간 경고등이 깜빡이는 장면

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 A 실사. 트럼프 대통령이 팔짱을 끼고 카메라를 정면으로 응시하며 냉소적인 웃음을 짓고 있다. 배경에는 호르무즈 해협에서 검은 연기를 뿜는 유조선이 보이고, 그 위로 'WTI $111 → $170?' 유가 차트가 급등하는 빨간 그래프가 겹쳐져 있다. 어두운 네이비 하늘에 화염의 오렌지빛이 반사.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic cinematic portrait of Donald Trump (US President, blond hair, navy suit with red tie) standing with arms crossed, facing the camera with a cold smirk. Behind him to the right, a massive oil tanker burns with thick black smoke rising into a dark navy sky. A glowing red oil price chart overlays the scene showing a sharp spike upward with 'WTI $111' and an arrow pointing to '$170'. The orange firelight from the burning tanker illuminates one side of Trump's face while the other side is lit by cool navy-blue ambient light. His confident posture contrasts with the chaos behind him, creating tension between political power and economic destruction. Trump and the burning tanker fill the upper 60% of the frame. Bright vivid colors with high contrast between warm fire tones and cool navy background, gold accent highlights on his suit buttons. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 B 실사. 30대 한국인 남성 직장인이 증권사 객장의 대형 전광판 앞에서 두 손을 번쩍 들고 환호하고 있다. 전광판에는 코스피 6091이 초록색으로 크게 표시되고 삼성전자/SK하이닉스가 급등 중. 하지만 전광판 한쪽 구석에 'WTI $170 경고' 빨간 플래시가 깜빡이고 있다. 투자자는 경고를 못 보고 기뻐하는 상황.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic shot of an attractive young Korean man in his 30s in a business casual shirt, standing in front of a massive electronic stock display board in a Korean brokerage office. He raises both fists in the air celebrating with an ecstatic expression, mouth open in a victory shout. The giant display behind him shows 'KOSPI 6091' in large bright green glowing numbers with Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix tickers surging upward. However, in the upper right corner of the display, a flashing red warning panel shows 'OIL $170' with a danger icon blinking ominously. The man is oblivious to the warning, focused only on the green numbers. Dramatic split lighting — warm golden light from the green display on his celebrating face, but harsh red light from the warning panel casting an ominous glow on one side. Both the man and the full display board fill the upper 60% of the frame. Deep navy blue ambient lighting in the brokerage office with vivid green and red screen colors as accents. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 와일드카드. A vs B 대조. 왼쪽에 환호하는 한국인 투자자들(2~3명)이 초록색 코스피 6091 전광판 앞에서 기뻐하고 있다. 오른쪽에 트럼프가 호르무즈 해협 지도 앞에서 주먹을 쥐고 위협적인 표정을 짓고 있고, 뒤로 유가 $170 빨간 차트가 보인다. 중앙에 날카로운 대각선 분리.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic split-composition image. Left side: two attractive young Korean office workers in their 30s celebrating excitedly in front of a stock display showing 'KOSPI 6091' in bright green numbers with upward arrows. Warm golden lighting, expressions of pure joy and disbelief, one pumping fist and the other clapping. Right side: Donald Trump (US President, blond hair, dark suit) standing in front of a military map of the Strait of Hormuz with red blockade markers, clenching his fist with a threatening determined expression. Behind him, a red oil price chart spikes sharply to '$170'. Cold harsh red-navy lighting on his side. A sharp diagonal line of light divides the two sides through the center. Left side radiates warm gold prosperity, right side radiates cold red danger. All figures shown from waist up with their respective context (screens, maps, charts) clearly visible in the upper 60% of the frame. Deep navy background on both sides with bright vivid accent colors. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements.
